steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
Replace $x$ with $3$ in the function.
$$
h(3)=18(2)^{-3}+5
$$

steps.title: Evaluate the exponent
steps.content:
A negative exponent means take the reciprocal.
$$
2^{-3}=\frac{1}{8}
$$
So
$$
h(3)=18\cdot\frac{1}{8}+5
$$

steps.title: Compute the value
steps.content: Finish the arithmetic. $$ 18\cdot\frac{1}{8}+5=\frac{18}{8}+5=\frac{9}{4}+\frac{20}{4}=\frac{29}{4} $$ The answer is B.
